debug_info.goal:
μ ν : Measure ℝ
inst✝¹ : IsProbabilityMeasure μ
inst✝ : IsProbabilityMeasure ν
n : ℕ
i j : Fin n
h : i < j
⊢ HasLaw (fun ω => wignerMatrixMap n ω i j) μ (WignerMeasure μ ν n)

failed_attempts:
letI : ∀ p, IsProbabilityMeasure (wignerMeasureDist μ ν n p) := fun p ↦ by
    rw [wignerMeasureDist]; split_ifs <;> assumption
  have h_eq : (fun ω ↦ wignerMatrixMap n ω i j) = fun ω ↦ ω ⟨(i, j), le_of_lt h⟩ := by
    ext ω
    simp [wignerMatrixMap, wignerMatrixMap', wignerMatrixEntryFunction, h, ne_of_lt h]
  rw [h_eq, WignerMeasure, HasLaw, Measure.map_eval_pi]
  simp [wignerMeasureDist, ne_of_lt h]

let p : Index n := ⟨(i, j), le_of_lt h⟩
  have h_eq : (fun ω ↦ wignerMatrixMap n ω i j) = fun ω ↦ ω p := by
    ext ω
    simp only [wignerMatrixMap, wignerMatrixMap', wignerMatrixEntryFunction]
    rw [dif_neg (ne_of_lt h), dif_pos h]
  rw [h_eq, HasLaw, WignerMeasure]
  haveI : ∀ x, IsProbabilityMeasure (wignerMeasureDist μ ν n x) := by
    intro x
    unfold wignerMeasureDist
    split_ifs <;> infer_instance
  rw [Measure.map_eval_pi]
  unfold wignerMeasureDist
  rw [if_neg (ne_of_lt h)]

rw [HasLaw, wignerMatrixMap, wignerMatrixMap']
  simp only [wignerMatrixEntryFunction, Matrix.of_apply, h, ne_of_lt h, not_false_eq_true,
    ↓reduceIte]
  rw [WignerMeasure, Measure.map_eval_pi]
  simp [wignerMeasureDist, ne_of_lt h]

let p : Index n := ⟨(i, j), le_of_lt h⟩
  have key : (fun ω ↦ (wignerMatrixMap n ω) i j) = fun ω ↦ ω p := by
    ext ω
    simp [wignerMatrixMap, wignerMatrixMap', wignerMatrixEntryFunction]
    split_ifs with h_eq h_lt
    · exact (ne_of_lt h h_eq).elim
    · congr
    · exact (h_lt h).elim
  rw [key, HasLaw, WignerMeasure, Measure.map_eval]
  simp [wignerMeasureDist, p, if_neg (ne_of_lt h)]

have : (fun ω ↦ wignerMatrixMap n ω i j) = fun ω ↦ ω ⟨(i, j), le_of_lt h⟩ := by
    ext; simp [wignerMatrixMap, wignerMatrixMap', wignerMatrixEntryFunction, h, ne_of_lt]
  rw [this, HasLaw, WignerMeasure, @Measure.map_eval_pi _ _ _ _ _ _ (fun p ↦ by
    unfold wignerMeasureDist; split_ifs <;> infer_instance)]
  simp [wignerMeasureDist, ne_of_lt h]

simp [HasLaw, wignerMatrixMap, wignerMatrixMap', wignerMatrixEntryFunction, h, h.ne]
  rw [WignerMeasure, Measure.map_eval_pi]
  simp [wignerMeasureDist, h.ne]

have h_eq : (fun ω ↦ wignerMatrixMap n ω i j) = fun ω ↦ ω ⟨(i, j), le_of_lt h⟩ := by

  rw [HasLaw, WignerMeasure, h_eq, Measure.map_eval_pi]
  simp [wignerMeasureDist, ne_of_lt h]

letI : ∀ p, IsFiniteMeasure (wignerMeasureDist μ ν n p) := fun p ↦ by
    dsimp [wignerMeasureDist]; split_ifs <;> infer_instance
  rw [HasLaw, WignerMeasure]
  convert Measure.map_eval_pi (wignerMeasureDist μ ν n) ⟨(i, j), le_of_lt h⟩
  · ext; simp [wignerMatrixMap, wignerMatrixMap', wignerMatrixEntryFunction, h, ne_of_lt h]
  · simp [wignerMeasureDist, ne_of_lt h]

  rw [HasLaw, WignerMeasure]
  have key : (fun ω ↦ wignerMatrixMap n ω i j) = fun ω ↦ ω ⟨(i, j), h.le⟩ := by

letI : ∀ p, IsProbabilityMeasure (wignerMeasureDist μ ν n p) := fun p ↦ by

  have h_eq : (fun ω ↦ wignerMatrixMap n ω i j) = fun ω ↦ ω ⟨(i, j), le_of_lt h⟩ := by
